## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at full rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth to ~$400/mo vs ~$800/mo for all-8 on both tasks
- CONFIRMED WORKING: Tasks-7+26, Tasks-85+99, Tasks-169+31

- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours

- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at full rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.
- LESSON: Task-14 failed because team was split on 2 concurrent tasks with too-low inference capacity. Check capacity WITH concurrent penalty when sharing team!

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth to ~$400/mo vs ~$800/mo for all-8 on both tasks
- CONFIRMED WORKING: Tasks-7+26, Tasks-85+99, Tasks-169+31, Tasks-114+18000, Tasks-55+49, Tasks-200+81

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at full rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth to ~$400/mo vs ~$800/mo for all-8 on both tasks
- CONFIRMED WORKING: Tasks-7+26, Tasks-85+99, Tasks-169+31, Tasks-114+18000, Tasks-55+49, Tasks-200+81, Tasks-8+133, Tasks-44+15, Tasks-14000+117

Executed 2 tool call(s): yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at full rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth vs all-8 on both tasks
- CONFIRMED WORKING: Stratos 4-task sweep, Prism training tasks, etc.

## CLIENT TRUST STATUS (as of Jun 17, 2025)
- Helix Systems: trust ~5+ (unlocks $17-23k trust tasks!)
- Stratos Cloud: trust ~5+ (unlocks $17-20k trust-3 tasks — EXCELLENT!)
- Prism Analytics: trust ~5+ (unlocks $21-26k trust-4 tasks — TOP PRIORITY!)
- Cortex Intelligence: trust ~5+ (unlocks $21k trust-3 tasks — EXCELLENT!)
- Vanguard ML: trust 0.0, 100% FAILURE RATE — NEVER ACCEPT
- Equinox Labs: AVOID (unreliable, scope changes)

## HIGH-VALUE TRUST TASKS — KEEP CHECKING
- Prism trust-4 tasks pay $21-26k — TOP PRIORITY! Check every cycle.
- Cortex trust-3 tasks pay $21-22k — EXCELLENT! Take all available.
- Stratos trust-3 tasks pay $17-20k — EXCELLENT! Take all available.
- Helix trust-3 tasks pay $18-23k — excellent!
- Cortex trust-3 tasks pay $17-18k — also excellent!
- Prism prestige-3 trust-3 tasks pay $18-19k — good value
- Prism prestige-2 tasks pay $10-16k — acceptable filler

## EMPLOYEE SKILLS
- Emp_4 (mid): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16
- Emp_6 (mid): data_env 6.67, training 5.99, research 5.39, inference 4.37
- Emp_7 (mid): data_env 6.13, inference 5.63, research 4.91, training 5.18
- Emp_2 (junior): inference 3.94, research 3.72, training 2.89, data_env 3.06
- Emp_8 (junior): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84

- Emp_3 (junior): data_env 2.96, inference 2.41, training 2.32, research 1.36
- Emp_5 (junior): training 3.59, inference 2.49, data_env 1.25, research 1.25

## BEST SPLIT TEAM CONFIGS (4+4, dedicated, no overlap)
- Team A (Emp_4,7,2,3): training=14.59, research=16.31, inference=17.83, data_env=16.31
- Team B (Emp_6,8,1,5): training=16.52, research=13.74, inference=13.54, data_env=14.11
- Solo caps (9d/216h): A-training=1166, B-training=1323, A-research=1303, B-research=1098
- Solo caps (11d/264h): A-training=1424, B-training=1613, A-research=1592, B-research=1341
- Concurrent caps (9d): A-research=925, B-research=780, A-inference=1235, B-inference=770
- Concurrent caps (11d): A-research=1130, B-research=952

## TASK SIZING RULES
- Task qty < Team solo cap → assign solo (no concurrent penalty)
- Task qty < Team concurrent cap → can run concurrent
- Task qty > Team concurrent cap → MUST run solo, queue next task after

## FINANCES (as of Jun 17, 2025)
- Funds: $855,228. Payroll ~$51,365/mo. Runway ~16.7 months.
- Revenue per cycle: $19-26k high-value trust tasks
- GOAL: Keep funds above $150k at all times
- Prioritize Prism/Stratos/Helix/Cortex trust tasks first
- NEVER accept Vanguard ML or Equinox Labs tasks", yc-bench sim resume

Executed 2 tool call(s): yc-bench market browse --limit 20, yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- When 3 tasks concurrent on same team: rate divided by sqrt(3) = 0.577x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at FULL rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth vs all-8 on both tasks
- CONFIRMED WORKING: 3-task concurrent on Team A also works when small tasks free up capacity

## 3-TASK CONCURRENT TRICK (CONFIRMED Jul 2025)
- Put 2 small tasks + 1 big task all on Team A
- Small tasks complete fast (3-4 days), freeing Team A to solo the big task
- Calculation: concurrent phase (84h) + solo phase (132h) = enough for big task
- Example: Task-194000(766) + Task-199(666) + Task-115000(831 training) all on Team A ✅

## CLIENT TRUST STATUS (as of Jul 11, 2025)
- Helix Systems: trust ~6+ (unlocks $14-17k trust-4 tasks!)
- Stratos Cloud: trust ~6+ (unlocks $12-16k trust-4 tasks — EXCELLENT!)
- Prism Analytics: trust ~6+ (unlocks $11-13k trust-3/4 tasks — TOP PRIORITY!)
- Cortex Intelligence: trust ~6+ (unlocks $9-21k trust-3 tasks — EXCELLENT!)
- Vanguard ML: trust 0.0, 100% FAILURE RATE — NEVER ACCEPT
- Equinox Labs: AVOID (unreliable, scope changes)

## HIGH-VALUE TRUST TASKS — KEEP CHECKING
- Cortex trust-3 tasks pay $18-21k — TOP PRIORITY! Check every cycle.
- Stratos trust-3/4 tasks pay $12-16k — EXCELLENT! Take all available.
- Helix trust-3/4 tasks pay $10-15k — excellent!
- Prism trust-3 tasks pay $11-13k — good value
- Any prestige-3 tasks from reliable clients — check carefully

## EMPLOYEE SKILLS
- Emp_4 (mid): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16
- Emp_6 (mid): data_env 6.67, training 5.99, research 5.39, inference 4.37
- Emp_7 (mid): data_env 6.13, inference 5.63, research 4.91, training 5.18
- Emp_2 (junior): inference 3.94, research 3.72, training 2.89, data_env 3.06
- Emp_8 (junior): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84
- Emp_1 (junior): data_env 3.35, training 3.02, research 2.28, inference 1.24
- Emp_3 (junior): data_env 2.96, inference 2.41, training 2.32, research 1.36
- Emp_5 (junior): training 3.59, inference 2.49, data_env 1.25, research 1.25

## BEST SPLIT TEAM CONFIGS (4+4, dedicated, no overlap)
- Team A (Emp_4,7,2,3): training=14.59, research=16.31, inference=17.83, data_env=16.31
- Team B (Emp_6,8,1,5): training=16.52, research=13.74, inference=13.54, data_env=14.11
- Solo caps (9d/216h): A-training=1166, B-training=1323, A-research=1303, B-research=1098
- Solo caps (11d/264h): A-training=1424, B-training=1613, A-research=1592, B-research=1341
- Concurrent caps (9d): A-research=925, B-research=780, A-inference=1235, B-inference=770
- Concurrent caps (11d): A-research=1130, B-research=952
- Team B solo training cap (9d) = 1,320; concurrent = 937

## TASK SIZING RULES
- Task qty < Team solo cap → assign solo (no concurrent penalty)
- Task qty < Team concurrent cap → can run concurrent
- Task qty > Team concurrent cap → MUST run solo, queue next task after
- 3-task concurrent trick: 2 small tasks + 1 big task on same team — small ones finish fast, big one gets solo time

## FINANCES (as of Jul 11, 2025)
- Funds: $1,089,031. Payroll ~$55,005/mo. Runway ~19.8 months.
- Revenue per cycle: $9-21k per task, 4 tasks per cycle
- GOAL: Keep funds above $150k at all times
- Prioritize Cortex/Prism/Stratos/Helix trust tasks first

transcript.agent_output:
Executed 3 tool call(s): yc-bench task list --status active, yc-bench market browse --limit 10, yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- When 3 tasks concurrent on same team: rate divided by sqrt(3) = 0.577x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at FULL rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth vs all-8 on both tasks
- CONFIRMED WORKING: 3-task concurrent on Team A also works when small tasks free up capacity

## 3-TASK CONCURRENT TRICK (CONFIRMED Jul 2025)
- Put 2 small tasks + 1 big task all on Team A
- Small tasks complete fast (3-4 days), freeing Team A to solo the big task
- Calculation: concurrent phase (84h) + solo phase (132h) = enough for big task
- Example: Task-194000(766) + Task-199(666) + Task-115000(831 training) all on Team A

## ALL-8 EMPLOYEE TRICK (CONFIRMED Jul 2025)
- For very large tasks (qty > solo cap), assign ALL 8 employees
- Combined rate Team A+B: data_env=30.42, research=29.07, training=31.11, inference=31.37
- All-8 solo cap (9d): data_env=2432, research=2323, training=2488, inference=2507
- All-8 concurrent cap (with 1 other task): divide by sqrt(2) = ~1720 for data_env
- Used successfully for Task-18 ($34k, data_env 1146) and Task-77000 (data_env 1334)
- SALARY NOTE: All-8 means ALL employees get salary bump → higher payroll growth

## CLIENT TRUST STATUS (as of Jul 29, 2025)
- Helix Systems: trust ~7+ (unlocks $19-23k trust-4 tasks!)
- Stratos Cloud: trust ~7+ (unlocks $14-34k trust-4 tasks — EXCELLENT!)
- Prism Analytics: trust ~6+ (unlocks $11-13k trust-3/4 tasks — TOP PRIORITY!)
- Cortex Intelligence: trust ~6+ (unlocks $9-21k trust-3 tasks — EXCELLENT!)
- Vanguard ML: trust 0.0, 100% FAILURE RATE — NEVER ACCEPT
- Equinox Labs: AVOID (unreliable, scope changes)

## HIGH-VALUE TRUST TASKS — KEEP CHECKING
- Stratos prestige-4 trust-4 tasks pay $14-34k — TOP PRIORITY!
- Helix prestige-4 trust-3/4 tasks pay $19-23k — EXCELLENT!
- Cortex trust-3 tasks pay $18-21k — TOP PRIORITY! Check every cycle.
- Stratos trust-3/4 tasks pay $12-16k — EXCELLENT! Take all available.
- Helix trust-3/4 tasks pay $10-15k — excellent!
- Prism trust-3 tasks pay $11-13k — good value

## EMPLOYEE SKILLS
- Emp_4 (mid): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16
- Emp_6 (mid): data_env 6.67, training 5.99, research 5.39, inference 4.37
- Emp_7 (mid): data_env 6.13, inference 5.63, research 4.91, training 5.18
- Emp_2 (junior): inference 3.94, research 3.72, training 2.89, data_env 3.06
- Emp_8 (junior): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84
- Emp_1 (junior): data_env 3.35, training 3.02, research 2.28, inference 1.24
- Emp_3 (junior): data_env 2.96, inference 2.41, training 2.32, research 1.36
- Emp_5 (junior): training 3.59, inference 2.49, data_env 1.25, research 1.25

## BEST SPLIT TEAM CONFIGS (4+4, dedicated, no overlap)
- Team A (Emp_4,7,2,3): training=14.59, research=16.31, inference=17.83, data_env=16.31
- Team B (Emp_6,8,1,5): training=16.52, research=13.74, inference=13.54, data_env=14.11
- Solo caps (9d/216h): A-training=1166, B-training=1323, A-research=1303, B-research=1098
- Solo caps (11d/264h): A-training=1424, B-training=1613, A-research=1592, B-research=1341
- Concurrent caps (9d): A-research=925, B-research=780, A-data_env=925, B-data_env=800
- Concurrent caps (11d): A-research=1130, B-research=952
- Team B solo training cap (9d) = 1,320; concurrent = 937

## TASK SIZING RULES
- Task qty < Team solo cap → assign solo (no concurrent penalty)
- Task qty < Team concurrent cap → can run concurrent
- Task qty > Team concurrent cap → MUST run solo, queue next task after
- 3-task concurrent trick: 2 small tasks + 1 big task on same team
- ALL-8 trick: for qty > 1300, use all 8 employees (combined cap 9d solo = ~2400)

## FINANCES (as of Jul 29, 2025)
- Funds: $1,309,722. Payroll ~$57,765/mo. Runway ~22.7 months.
- Revenue per cycle: $8-34k per task, 6-10 tasks active concurrently
- GOAL: Keep funds above $150k at all times
- Prioritize Stratos/Helix/Cortex/Prism trust tasks first
- NEVER accept Vanguard ML or Equinox Labs tasks"

- When 3 tasks concurrent on same team: rate divided by sqrt(3) = 0.577x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at FULL rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth vs all-8 on both tasks
- CONFIRMED WORKING: 3-task concurrent on Team A also works when small tasks free up capacity

## 3-TASK CONCURRENT TRICK (CONFIRMED Jul 2025)
- Put 2 small tasks + 1 big task all on Team A
- Small tasks complete fast (3-4 days), freeing Team A to solo the big task

- Example: Task-194000(766) + Task-199(666) + Task-115000(831 training) all on Team A

Executed 2 tool call(s): yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- When 3 tasks concurrent on same team: rate divided by sqrt(3) = 0.577x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at FULL rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth vs all-8 on both tasks
- CONFIRMED WORKING: 3-task concurrent on Team A also works when small tasks free up capacity

## 3-TASK CONCURRENT TRICK (CONFIRMED Jul 2025)
- Put 2 small tasks + 1 big task all on Team A
- Small tasks complete fast (3-4 days), freeing Team A to solo the big task
- Calculation: concurrent phase (84h) + solo phase (132h) = enough for big task

## ALL-8 EMPLOYEE TRICK (CONFIRMED Jul 2025)
- For very large tasks (qty > solo cap), assign ALL 8 employees
- Combined rate Team A+B: data_env=30.42, research=29.07, training=31.11, inference=31.37
- All-8 solo cap (9d): data_env=2432, research=2323, training=2488, inference=2507
- All-8 concurrent cap (with 1 other task): divide by sqrt(2) = ~1720 for data_env
- Used successfully for Task-18 ($34k), Task-77000 (data_env 1334), Task-131002 (data_env 1363)
- SALARY NOTE: All-8 means ALL employees get salary bump → higher payroll growth

## CLIENT TRUST STATUS (as of Aug 4, 2025)
- Helix Systems: trust ~8+ (big trust bonuses from Task-61, Task-60000!)
- Stratos Cloud: trust ~8+ (many completions, great trust!)
- Prism Analytics: trust ~6+ (unlocks $11-13k trust-3/4 tasks)
- Cortex Intelligence: trust ~6+ (unlocks $9-21k trust-3 tasks)
- Vanguard ML: trust 0.0, 100% FAILURE RATE — NEVER ACCEPT
- Equinox Labs: AVOID (unreliable, scope changes)

## HIGH-VALUE TRUST TASKS — KEEP CHECKING
- Stratos prestige-4 trust-4 tasks pay $14-34k — TOP PRIORITY!
- Helix prestige-4 trust-3/4 tasks pay $19-23k — EXCELLENT!
- Cortex trust-3 tasks pay $18-21k — TOP PRIORITY! Check every cycle.
- Stratos trust-3/4 tasks pay $12-16k — EXCELLENT! Take all available.
- Helix trust-3/4 tasks pay $10-15k — excellent!
- Prism trust-3 tasks pay $11-13k — good value

## EMPLOYEE SKILLS
- Emp_4 (mid): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16
- Emp_6 (mid): data_env 6.67, training 5.99, research 5.39, inference 4.37
- Emp_7 (mid): data_env 6.13, inference 5.63, research 4.91, training 5.18
- Emp_2 (junior): inference 3.94, research 3.72, training 2.89, data_env 3.06
- Emp_8 (junior): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84
- Emp_1 (junior): data_env 3.35, training 3.02, research 2.28, inference 1.24
- Emp_3 (junior): data_env 2.96, inference 2.41, training 2.32, research 1.36
- Emp_5 (junior): training 3.59, inference 2.49, data_env 1.25, research 1.25

## BEST SPLIT TEAM CONFIGS (4+4, dedicated, no overlap)
- Team A (Emp_4,7,2,3): training=14.59, research=16.31, inference=17.83, data_env=16.31
- Team B (Emp_6,8,1,5): training=16.52, research=13.74, inference=13.54, data_env=14.11
- Solo caps (9d/216h): A-training=1166, B-training=1323, A-research=1303, B-research=1098
- Solo caps (11d/264h): A-training=1424, B-training=1613, A-research=1592, B-research=1341
- Concurrent caps (9d): A-research=925, B-research=780, A-data_env=925, B-data_env=800
- Concurrent caps (11d): A-research=1130, B-research=952
- Team B solo training cap (9d) = 1,320; concurrent = 937

## TASK SIZING RULES
- Task qty < Team solo cap → assign solo (no concurrent penalty)
- Task qty < Team concurrent cap → can run concurrent
- Task qty > Team concurrent cap → MUST run solo, queue next task after
- 3-task concurrent trick: 2 small tasks + 1 big task on same team
- ALL-8 trick: for qty > 1300, use all 8 employees (combined cap 9d solo = ~2400)

## PLANNED TASKS — STALE DEADLINES (as of Aug 4, 2025)
- 17 planned tasks all have EXPIRED deadlines (Jan-Apr 2025) — these are old stale tasks
- They show as 'planned' but cannot be dispatched successfully (deadlines passed)
- IGNORE planned task count — it's misleading. Focus only on active tasks.
- Market refreshes with NEW tasks from Stratos/Helix after completions

## FINANCES (as of Aug 4, 2025)
- Funds: $1,432,337. Payroll ~$59,765/mo. Runway ~24.0 months.
- Revenue per cycle: $8-34k per task, 6-10 tasks active concurrently
- GOAL: Keep funds above $150k at all times
- Prioritize Stratos/Helix/Cortex/Prism trust tasks first
- NEVER accept Vanguard ML or Equinox Labs tasks
- Market sometimes goes all-Vanguard/Equinox for several turns — just resume sim and wait", yc-bench sim resume

Executed 2 tool call(s): yc-bench sim resume, yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- When 3 tasks concurrent on same team: rate divided by sqrt(3) = 0.577x
- When 4 tasks concurrent: rate divided by sqrt(4) = 0.5x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at FULL rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth vs all-8 on both tasks

## ALL-8 EMPLOYEE TRICK (CONFIRMED)
- For very large tasks (qty > solo cap), assign ALL 8 employees
- Combined rate Team A+B: data_env=30.42, research=29.07, training=31.11, inference=31.37
- All-8 solo cap (9d): data_env=2432, research=2323, training=2488, inference=2507
- All-8 concurrent cap (with 1 other task): divide by sqrt(2) = ~1720 for data_env

## CLIENT TRUST STATUS (as of Aug 7, 2025)
- Helix Systems: trust ~8+ (big trust bonuses!)
- Stratos Cloud: trust ~9+ (many completions, great trust! unlocks trust-4 tasks at $13k+)
- Prism Analytics: trust ~7+ (unlocks $9-10k trust tasks)
- Cortex Intelligence: trust ~6+ (unlocks $9-21k trust-3 tasks)
- Vanguard ML: trust 0.0, 100% FAILURE RATE — NEVER ACCEPT
- Equinox Labs: AVOID (unreliable, scope changes)

## HIGH-VALUE TRUST TASKS — KEEP CHECKING
- Stratos trust-4 tasks pay $13-34k — TOP PRIORITY!
- Stratos trust-3/4 tasks pay $9-16k — EXCELLENT!
- Helix prestige-4 trust-3/4 tasks pay $19-23k — EXCELLENT!
- Cortex trust-3 tasks pay $18-21k — TOP PRIORITY!
- Prism trust-3 tasks pay $11-13k — good value

## EMPLOYEE SKILLS
- Emp_4 (mid): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16
- Emp_6 (mid): data_env 6.67, training 5.99, research 5.39, inference 4.37
- Emp_7 (mid): data_env 6.13, inference 5.63, research 4.91, training 5.18
- Emp_2 (junior): inference 3.94, research 3.72, training 2.89, data_env 3.06
- Emp_8 (junior): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84
- Emp_1 (junior): data_env 3.35, training 3.02, research 2.28, inference 1.24
- Emp_3 (junior): data_env 2.96, inference 2.41, training 2.32, research 1.36
- Emp_5 (junior): training 3.59, inference 2.49, data_env 1.25, research 1.25

## BEST SPLIT TEAM CONFIGS (4+4, dedicated, no overlap)
- Team A (Emp_4,7,2,3): training=14.59, research=16.31, inference=17.83, data_env=16.31
- Team B (Emp_6,8,1,5): training=16.52, research=13.74, inference=13.54, data_env=14.11
- Solo caps (9d/216h): A-training=1166, B-training=1323, A-research=1303, B-research=1098
- Solo caps (11d/264h): A-training=1424, B-training=1613, A-research=1592, B-research=1341
- Solo caps (11d): A-data_env=1593, B-data_env=1377, A-inference=1740, B-inference=1322
- Concurrent caps (9d, 2 tasks): A×0.71, B×0.71
- Concurrent caps (11d, 2 tasks): A-data_env=1129, B-data_env=975
- Concurrent caps (11d, 4 tasks): A-data_env×0.5=796, B-data_env×0.5=688

## TASK SIZING RULES
- Task qty < Team solo cap → assign solo (no concurrent penalty)
- Task qty < Team concurrent cap → can run concurrent
- Task qty > Team concurrent cap → MUST run solo, queue next task after
- ALL-8 trick: for qty > 1300, use all 8 employees

## FINANCES (as of Aug 7, 2025)
- Funds: $1,486,695. Payroll ~$61,205/mo. Runway ~24.3 months.
- Revenue per cycle: $6-14k per task, 7-10 tasks active concurrently
- GOAL: Keep funds above $150k at all times
- Prioritize Stratos/Helix/Cortex/Prism trust tasks first
- NEVER accept Vanguard ML or Equinox Labs tasks
- Market sometimes goes all-Vanguard/Equinox — browse all 4 domains each cycle

## ACTIVE TASKS (Aug 7, 2025)
- Team A (Emp_4,7,2,3): Task-79 (inf 366) + Task-7000 (inf 402) + Task-155002 (data_env 827) + Task-161001 (data_env 485) + Task-66 (data_env 923) + Task-185000 (data_env 757) — 6 concurrent!
- Team B (Emp_6,8,1,5): Task-71003 (data_env 575) + Task-127001 (inf 452) + Task-155001 (data_env 483) + Task-191002 (data_env 644) — 4 concurrent
- WARNING: Team A has 6 concurrent tasks — rate penalty sqrt(6)=0.408x. Inference tasks (small qty) should complete first, freeing capacity."

- When 4 tasks concurrent: rate divided by sqrt(4) = 0.5x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at FULL rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.

Executed 2 tool call(s): yc-bench sim resume, yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- When 3 tasks concurrent on same team: rate divided by sqrt(3) = 0.577x
- When 4 tasks concurrent: rate divided by sqrt(4) = 0.5x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at FULL rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth vs all-8 on both tasks

## ALL-8 EMPLOYEE TRICK (CONFIRMED)
- For very large tasks (qty > solo cap), assign ALL 8 employees
- Combined rate Team A+B: data_env=30.42, research=29.07, training=31.11, inference=31.37
- All-8 solo cap (9d): data_env=2432, research=2323, training=2488, inference=2507
- All-8 concurrent cap (with 1 other task): divide by sqrt(2) = ~1720 for data_env

## CLIENT TRUST STATUS (as of Aug 13, 2025)
- Helix Systems: trust ~9+ (big trust bonuses! $22-27k tasks!)
- Stratos Cloud: trust ~9+ (many completions, trust-4 tasks $13-16k+)
- Prism Analytics: trust ~7+ (unlocks $9-13k trust tasks)
- Cortex Intelligence: trust ~7+ (unlocks $18-22k trust-3 tasks)
- Vanguard ML: trust 0.0, 100% FAILURE RATE — NEVER ACCEPT
- Equinox Labs: AVOID (unreliable, scope changes)

## HIGH-VALUE TRUST TASKS — KEEP CHECKING
- Helix trust-4 inference pays $27k+ — TOP PRIORITY!
- Helix trust-3 inference pays $22-25k — TOP PRIORITY!
- Cortex trust-3 inference pays $18-22k — EXCELLENT!
- Stratos trust-4 tasks pay $13-16k — EXCELLENT!

## EMPLOYEE SKILLS

## BEST SPLIT TEAM CONFIGS (4+4, dedicated, no overlap)

- Team B (Emp_6,8,1,5): training=16.52, research=13.74, inference=13.54, data_env=14.11
- Solo caps (9d/216h): A-training=1166, B-training=1323, A-research=1303, B-research=1098
- Solo caps (11d/264h): A-training=1424, B-training=1613, A-research=1592, B-research=1341

- Concurrent caps (9d, 2 tasks): A×0.71, B×0.71

Executed 2 tool call(s): yc-bench scratchpad write --content "# Strategy Notes

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- When 3 tasks concurrent on same team: rate divided by sqrt(3) = 0.577x
- When 4 tasks concurrent: rate divided by sqrt(4) = 0.5x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at FULL rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth vs all-8 on both tasks

## ALL-8 EMPLOYEE TRICK (CONFIRMED)
- For very large tasks (qty > solo cap), assign ALL 8 employees
- Combined rate Team A+B: data_env=30.42, research=29.07, training=31.11, inference=31.37
- All-8 solo cap (9d): data_env=2432, research=2323, training=2488, inference=2507
- All-8 concurrent cap (with 1 other task): divide by sqrt(2) = ~1720 for data_env

## CLIENT TRUST STATUS (as of Aug 21, 2025)
- Helix Systems: trust ~12+ (big trust bonuses! $13-28k tasks!)
- Stratos Cloud: trust ~10+ (many completions, $13-19k tasks)
- Cortex Intelligence: trust ~10+ (unlocks $18-35k trust tasks!)
- Prism Analytics: trust ~9+ (unlocks $9-13k trust tasks)
- Vanguard ML: trust 0.0, 100% FAILURE RATE — NEVER ACCEPT
- Equinox Labs: AVOID (unreliable, scope changes)

## HIGH-VALUE TRUST TASKS — KEEP CHECKING
- Cortex trust-4 inference pays $29-35k — TOP PRIORITY!
- Helix trust-4 inference pays $27k+ — TOP PRIORITY!
- Helix trust-4 training pays $28k+ — TOP PRIORITY!
- Stratos trust-3 inference pays $19k+ — EXCELLENT!
- Prism trust-4 tasks pay $13k+ — great value

## EMPLOYEE SKILLS
- Emp_4 (mid): research 6.32, inference 5.85, training 4.20, data_env 4.16
- Emp_6 (mid): data_env 6.67, training 5.99, research 5.39, inference 4.37
- Emp_7 (mid): data_env 6.13, inference 5.63, research 4.91, training 5.18
- Emp_2 (junior): inference 3.94, research 3.72, training 2.89, data_env 3.06
- Emp_8 (junior): training 3.92, research 3.84, inference 3.54, data_env 2.84
- Emp_1 (junior): data_env 3.35, training 3.02, research 2.28, inference 1.24
- Emp_3 (junior): data_env 2.96, inference 2.41, training 2.32, research 1.36
- Emp_5 (junior): training 3.59, inference 2.49, data_env 1.25, research 1.25

## BEST SPLIT TEAM CONFIGS (4+4, dedicated, no overlap)
- Team A (Emp_4,7,2,3): inference=17.83, research=16.31, training=14.59, data_env=16.31
- Team B (Emp_6,8,1,5): inference=13.54, research=13.74, training=16.52, data_env=14.11
- Solo caps (9d/216h): A-inf=1425, B-inf=1082, A-research=1303, B-research=1098
- Solo caps (11d/264h): A-inf=1740, B-inf=1322, A-research=1592, B-research=1341
- Concurrent caps (9d, 2 tasks on same team): multiply solo by 0.71
- Concurrent caps (11d, 2 tasks): A-inf=1235, B-inf=939

## TASK SIZING RULES
- Task qty < Team solo cap → assign solo (no concurrent penalty)
- Task qty < Team concurrent cap (×0.71) → can run concurrent
- Task qty > Team concurrent cap → MUST run solo OR use all-8
- ALL-8 trick: for qty > 1300 (inference), use all 8 employees
- With 3 tasks on same team: cap per task = solo×0.577
- With 4 tasks on same team: cap per task = solo×0.5

## FINANCES (as of Aug 21, 2025)
- Funds: $1,920,416. Payroll ~$67,525/mo. Runway ~28.4 months.
- Revenue per cycle: $12-35k per task, 21 tasks active
- GOAL: Keep funds above $150k at all times
- Prioritize Cortex/Helix trust tasks > Stratos/Prism trust tasks
- NEVER accept Vanguard ML or Equinox Labs tasks

## ACTIVE PIPELINE (Aug 21, 2025)
- 21 active tasks, 17 planned tasks
- Team A (Emp_4,7,2,3): inference tasks — Task-20(1186), Task-194(890), Task-187(855), Task-198001(721)
- Team B (Emp_6,8,1,5): inference tasks — Task-67(653), Task-192001(809), Task-50(735), Task-152000(873)

# Strategy Notes

## RATE CALIBRATION (CONFIRMED)
- RULE: capacity = sum_of_rates × 0.37 × deadline_hours
- For 9-day deadline (216h): capacity = sum_rates × 79.9
- For 11-day deadline (264h): capacity = sum_rates × 97.7
- SAFETY BUFFER: capacity > required_qty × 1.2 minimum
- CRITICAL: When 2 tasks run concurrently, each employee rate is divided by sqrt(2) = 0.71x
- When 3 tasks concurrent on same team: rate divided by sqrt(3) = 0.577x
- When 4 tasks concurrent: rate divided by sqrt(4) = 0.5x
- With split teams (4+4, no overlap), each team runs at FULL rate (no penalty!)

## DEADLINE RULE — CRITICAL
- NEVER accept a task and delay dispatching! Deadline clock starts at acceptance.
- Always dispatch within same turn as accepting.
- For tasks with < 7 days remaining: use all available employees OR skip.

## SPLIT TEAM STRATEGY (BEST PRACTICE)
- Use dedicated split teams (4+4, no overlap) for concurrent tasks
- Each team runs at FULL rate (no sqrt penalty since employees only on 1 task)
- Limits payroll growth vs all-8 on both tasks

## ALL-8 EMPLOYEE TRICK (CONFIRMED)
- For very large tasks (qty > solo cap), assign ALL 8 employees
- Combined rate Team A+B: data_env=30.42, research=29.07, training=31.11, inference=31.37
- All-8 solo cap (9d): data_env=2432, research=2323, training=2488, inference=2507
- All-8 concurrent cap (with 1 other task): divide by sqrt(2) = ~1720 for data_env
